mapper.select:
SELECT p.post_id, p.title, p.excerpt, p.cover_image, p.likes, p.views, p.create_time, p.content, p.version, c.name as category_name, t.name as tag_name, cm.comment_id, cm.author_name as comment_author, cm.content as comment_content, cm.create_time as comment_time, cm.parent_comment_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM blog_comment WHERE post_id = p.post_id AND parent_comment_id IS NULL) as comment_count FROM blog_post p LEFT JOIN blog_category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN blog_post_tag pt ON p.post_id = pt.post_id LEFT JOIN blog_tag t ON pt.tag_id = t.tag_id LEFT JOIN blog_comment cm ON p.post_id = cm.post_id AND cm.parent_comment_id IS NULL
p.status = 1
AND p.post_id IN ( SELECT pt2.post_id FROM blog_post_tag pt2 JOIN blog_tag t2 ON pt2.tag_id = t2.tag_id WHERE t2.name = #{tag} )
AND ( p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR p.excerpt LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') )
ORDER BY
p.likes DESC, p.create_time DESC
comment_count DESC, p.create_time DESC
p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.*, c.name as category_name, t.name as tag_name, cm.comment_id, cm.author_name as comment_author, cm.content as comment_content, cm.create_time as comment_time, cm.parent_comment_id FROM blog_post p LEFT JOIN blog_category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN blog_post_tag pt ON p.post_id = pt.post_id LEFT JOIN blog_tag t ON pt.tag_id = t.tag_id LEFT JOIN blog_comment cm ON p.post_id = cm.post_id AND cm.parent_comment_id IS NULL WHERE p.post_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_comment (post_id, parent_comment_id, author_name, content, create_time) VALUES (#{postId}, #{parentId}, #{author}, #{content}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT comment_id, post_id, parent_comment_id, author_name as comment_author, content as comment_content, create_time as comment_time FROM blog_comment WHERE parent_comment_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_post (title, excerpt, content, cover_image, category_id, create_time, likes, status, views, version) VALUES ( #{title}, #{excerpt}, #{content}, #{imageUrl}, (SELECT category_id FROM blog_category WHERE name = #{category} LIMIT 1), NOW(), 0, 1, 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_post SET title = #{title}, excerpt = #{excerpt}, content = #{content}, cover_image = #{imageUrl}, category_id = (SELECT category_id FROM blog_category WHERE name = #{category} LIMIT 1), update_time = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT tag_id FROM blog_tag WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT category_id FROM blog_category WHERE name = #{name}
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_post SET views = views + 1 WHERE post_id = #{id}
UPDATE blog_post SET views = #{views} WHERE post_id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT total_views FROM site_stats WHERE id = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE site_stats SET total_views = total_views + 1 WHERE id = 1
UPDATE site_stats SET total_views = #{total} WHERE id = 1
